seoTitle: Sinofuse (Zhongrong) News | EV Fuse Innovations, Product Releases
seoDescription: Latest news from Sinofuse including new product releases, technology innovations, and industry developments in high-voltage DC circuit protection.

news.title: Sinofuse Expands 1500V Energy Storage Fuse Portfolio
news.summary: Sinofuse announces expanded range of 1500VDC fuses for utility-scale battery energy storage systems with ratings up to 800A and 100kA breaking capacity.
news.content:
Xi'an Sinofuse Electronics Co., Ltd. (Zhongrong) has expanded its energy storage fuse portfolio with new 1500VDC ratings designed for utility-scale battery energy storage systems (BESS). The new fuses feature current ratings from 400A to 800A with industry-leading 100kA breaking capacity at 1500VDC.

The expanded portfolio addresses the growing demand for higher voltage BESS installations that reduce DC cabling costs and improve system efficiency. The new fuses incorporate time-delay characteristics optimized for inverter coordination, preventing nuisance blowing during capacitor pre-charge while providing reliable protection during fault conditions.

Key features of the new ESS-1500 series include:
- Voltage ratings: 1500VDC
- Current ratings: 400A, 500A, 630A, 800A
- Breaking capacity: 100kA at 1500VDC
- Time-delay characteristic for inverter coordination
- Compact bolt-on mounting
- UL 248-13 and IEC 60269-7 recognition

The new fuses are ideal for utility-scale solar-plus-storage projects, grid stabilization installations, and commercial energy storage systems operating at 1500VDC.

news.title: Sinofuse Achieves IATF 16949 Automotive Quality Certification
news.summary: Sinofuse receives IATF 16949 certification, reinforcing its commitment to automotive quality standards for EV fuse manufacturing.
news.content:
Xi'an Sinofuse Electronics Co., Ltd. has successfully achieved IATF 16949:2016 automotive quality management system certification following a comprehensive audit process. This certification validates Sinofuse's quality management systems for the design and manufacture of fuses for electric vehicle applications.

IATF 16949 is the international standard for quality management systems in the automotive industry, requiring rigorous processes for continuous improvement, defect prevention, and reduction of variation and waste. The certification is recognized by major automotive OEMs worldwide and is often a prerequisite for supplier qualification.

This achievement reinforces Sinofuse's position as a leading supplier of high-voltage DC fuses for the electric vehicle industry. The company's EV fuse portfolio, including the EVS series rated up to 1000VDC and 100kA breaking capacity, is now manufactured under IATF 16949-certified processes.

LiTong Electronics, as an authorized distributor, can provide IATF 16949-certified Sinofuse products with full traceability and quality documentation for automotive customers.

news.title: Sinofuse Introduces Enhanced Fuse Series for 800V EV Platforms
news.summary: New EVS-1000 series fuses optimized for 800V electric vehicle architectures with improved breaking capacity and compact design.
news.content:
Sinofuse has introduced the enhanced EVS-1000 series of high-voltage DC fuses specifically designed for 800V electric vehicle battery systems. The new series addresses the industry trend toward higher voltage architectures that enable faster charging and improved efficiency.

The EVS-1000 series features:
- 1000VDC rating for 800V nominal systems
- Current ratings: 200A to 800A
- Breaking capacity: 100kA at 1000VDC
- Compact Size 3 footprint (76mm body)
- Bolt-on M10 terminals
- Operating temperature: -40°C to +125°C
- UL 248-13 and IEC 60269-7 compliance

The enhanced design incorporates advanced arc quenching technology for reliable DC interruption at high voltages, critical for 800V+ systems where arc management is more challenging than at lower voltages.

Major Chinese EV manufacturers have already qualified the EVS-1000 series for new 800V platform development, with volume production scheduled to begin in Q2 2026.

news.title: LiTong and Sinofuse Expand Distribution Partnership
news.summary: LiTong Electronics strengthens partnership with Sinofuse, expanding inventory and technical support for high-voltage DC fuse products.
news.content:
LiTong Electronics and Xi'an Sinofuse Electronics Co., Ltd. have announced an expansion of their distribution partnership to meet growing demand for high-voltage DC circuit protection in the new energy sector.

The expanded partnership includes:
- Increased strategic inventory of EV and BESS fuse series
- Enhanced technical support capabilities with dedicated FAE resources
- Joint customer training programs on high-voltage DC protection
- Coordinated market development for solar and energy storage sectors
- Faster sample and prototype delivery for development projects

LiTong will stock key Sinofuse products including the EVS series for electric vehicles (500V-1000V), ESS series for energy storage (1000V-1500V), and PV series for solar applications (1000V-1500V).

This partnership expansion reflects the strong growth in China's new energy vehicle and energy storage markets, where Sinofuse has established a leading position in high-voltage DC fuse supply.

news.title: Sinofuse Expands UL Recognition for North American Market
news.summary: Additional Sinofuse EV and energy storage fuse series receive UL recognition, facilitating entry into North American markets.
news.content:
Sinofuse has received expanded UL recognition for its high-voltage DC fuse portfolio, enabling broader access to the North American electric vehicle and energy storage markets.

The newly recognized products include:
- EVS series EV fuses (500V-1000V, 100A-800A)
- ESS series energy storage fuses (1000V-1500V, 100A-800A)
- PV series photovoltaic fuses (1000V-1500V, 10A-50A)

All recognized products comply with UL 248-13 for semiconductor fuses and UL 248-19 for photovoltaic fuses, meeting the safety requirements for North American installations.

The UL recognition includes:
- Component Recognition for OEM integration
- cULus listing for Canada and US markets
- Full traceability and quality documentation

This expansion of UL recognition supports Sinofuse's international growth strategy and provides North American customers with a cost-effective alternative to established international fuse brands while maintaining equivalent safety certifications.
